# HPD.ML.Transforms.OneHotEncodeTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Encodes a categorical column as indicator (one-hot) vectors. Unknown values map to all-zeros.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class OneHotEncodeTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
